## Sponsor PR

### Checklist

- [ ] I have only modified `sponsors.json`
- [ ] My `name` is 20 characters or fewer
- [ ] My `text` is 30 characters or fewer (Silver/Gold)
- [ ] I have coordinated payment with the maintainer

### What happens next

> After payment verification, a maintainer will add the `payment-verified` label and this PR will be auto-merged.

> Changes will be live within ~24h after merge (jsDelivr CDN cache).
